title: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for
display_title: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for
wikitext:
[]: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by Snow » Mon Mar 13, 2017 11:45 am As stated above, who is the character you feel most sympathy towards and why? Altrough you could argue that almost every single character in the show is somewhat miserable and deeply hurt, i would go for Rei II. A purpose-created clone of someone else, without any social capabilities or other meaning of existence than to comply orders is quite a fate to have.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Mar 13, 2017 12:00 pm In the show, the one that I feel has least fulfillment and so earns my sympathy is Kaworu. In Rebuild , ReiQ - the reasons you give for Rei II are all the more stark in that version.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by Snow » Mon Mar 13, 2017 12:14 pm I have trouble exactly defining my thoughts on Nagisa, since he is somewhat of a shady character on the show. He appears to be self-confident during his appearances and is aware of his surroundings. Although we do not get to exactly see things from his perspective, he seems to be relatively content. I'm not really into Rebuild, so i can not exactly judge Rei II from rebuild.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Mar 13, 2017 12:31 pm They're all reprehensible little shits, Shinji especially. The only pure character is Rei, and she gets all my hugs.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Mar 13, 2017 1:10 pm ^^ Kaworu (in the series) is like a dragonfly (damsel fly); he emerges fully-formed and beautiful from his chrysalis to perform the limited role that fate has decreed for him, only to discover that it must end in death within hours/days. How can anyone not be sad for him?

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by Snow » Mon Mar 13, 2017 1:21 pm pwhodges wrote: ^^ Kaworu (in the series) is like a dragonfly (damsel fly); he emerges fully-formed and beautiful from his chrysalis to perform the limited role that fate has decreed for him, only to discover that it must end in death within hours/days. How can anyone not be sad for him?

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Mar 13, 2017 1:28 pm Kaworu actually seems to have a grand time with his doomed life even if he generally only makes things worse, and his death is always his own choice. ReiQ is unquestionably the saddest of the sad little girls.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by RadicalRandy » Mon Mar 13, 2017 1:43 pm Kaworu's short life is something he accepts much easier than the other characters, as well as something he enjoyed while he was alive. I empathize much more with characters like Shinji and Asuka (original series), so they get my vote.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by Snow » Mon Mar 13, 2017 2:06 pm RadicalRandy wrote: Kaworu's short life is something he accepts much easier than the other characters, as well as something he enjoyed while he was alive. I empathize much more with characters like Shinji and Asuka (original series), so they get my vote.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Mar 13, 2017 2:48 pm Shinji. No contest.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 13, 2017 5:29 pm Kaworu is more a cipher than an actual character. :3 Though that said, I am probably more moe for Kyoko, Dr. Katsuragi, and the Angels than any of the actually developed cast. So yeah.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by CommanderFish » Mon Mar 13, 2017 5:53 pm This character: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 13, 2017 7:22 pm No nonfictional persons who don't actually appear as characters in the work, CF. :p

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by Rei IV » Tue Mar 14, 2017 11:25 am Ritsuko. End of Evangelion really highlighted her self-hatred and showed at her most vulnerable. Ritz was probably one of the secondary characters in Eva that had profound effect me. Like Shin-chan, she just wants to be loved and desperately seeking/craving the intimacy many of the characters want.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Mar 14, 2017 12:22 pm Either Asuka or Ritsuko. Their mothers' suicides both had profound effects on them.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Tue Mar 14, 2017 1:10 pm Rei Q in rebuild and the Rei in the manga and anime and Asuka as her back story is just so tragic.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue Mar 14, 2017 1:37 pm pwhodges wrote: ^^ Kaworu (in the series) is like a dragonfly (damsel fly); he emerges fully-formed and beautiful from his chrysalis to perform the limited role that fate has decreed for him, only to discover that it must end in death within hours/days. How can anyone not be sad for him?

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Mar 14, 2017 2:43 pm Sohryu Asuka Langley, of course. She is the one who comes closest to being the innocent victim even in the original series alone, without having a movie that sets out to kerb-stomp her.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by Snow » Tue Mar 14, 2017 3:29 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Sohryu Asuka Langley, of course. She is the one who comes closest to being the innocent victim even in the original series alone, without having a movie that sets out to kerb-stomp her.

[]: Re: Who is the EVA character you feel most sorry for?             Quote Post by CommanderFish » Wed Mar 15, 2017 1:25 am Reichu wrote: No nonfictional persons who don't actually appear as characters in the work, CF. :p
